Glossary
Value	Price
The total value of the trade/position, where the quantity is multiplied by the price.	The end-of-day market price in the instrument currency.
Adjustment	Pro	fi	t
Corrections made to the account balance due to unusual circumstances (e.g. changes to the amount of a corporate	The realized positive result from trading via a CFD or Invest account.
action after distribution)
Closed result
Average Price	• In Overview, the sum of results in different currencies is converted into the primary account currency using the
The average price of the open prices for each	fi	ll for the position.	end-of-day exchange rate from the end of the tax year.

Bonus

CFD
Contract for difference.	Tax Withheld
The amount of the withholding tax for dividends and/or distributions.
Dividend
In the CFD Overview, it shows the net dividend received.	WHT
A tax deducted at source, especially one levied by some countries on interest or dividends paid to a person resident
Dividend adjustment	outside that country
When an adjustment related to an already-paid dividend is processed.
WHT Rate
Net Dividend	The percentage applied as a withholding tax
Dividend received following withholding taxation in an Invest account.
Exchange and government fees
Gross Dividend	It includes PRM-fees, FINRA-fees, transaction costs, stamp duty, etc.
Dividend received prior to withholding taxation in an Invest account.
Third-party fees
Loss	In the Overview, showing the sum of Exchange and government fees, and ADR fees.
The realized negative result from trading via a CFD or Invest account.
ADR fee
Execution price	An administrative fee for holding American Depositary Receipts (ADRs). This small cost is from the depository bank
The price at which the instrument was sold or a position was closed.	that manages the stock, and we pass it directly to you—typically $0.01 to $0.05 per share.
FX Fee
Represents the total amount of currency conversion fees from your trades and manual currency exchanges.
